files.patch:
@@ -36,12 +36,0 @@
-    - name: 'Get CRIU URL configuration'
-      id: criu_url
-      uses: ./.github/actions/config
-      with:
-        var: LINUX_X64_CRIU_URL
-
-    - name: 'Get CRIU SHA256 configuration'
-      id: criu_sha256
-      uses: ./.github/actions/config
-      with:
-        var: LINUX_X64_CRIU_SHA256
-
@@ -52,2 +40,2 @@
-        path: ~/criu/criu
-        key: criu-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.criu_url.outputs.value }}
+        path: /usr/sbin/criu
+        key: criu-${{ runner.os }}
@@ -55,1 +43,1 @@
-    - name: Download CRIU
+    - name: Install CRIU
@@ -57,7 +45,6 @@
-        CRIU_URL=${{ steps.criu_url.outputs.value }}
-        CRIU_FILENAME=$(basename $CRIU_URL)
-        wget --progress=dot:mega $CRIU_URL
-        echo "${{ steps.criu_sha256.outputs.value }} $CRIU_FILENAME" | sha256sum -c >/dev/null -
-        mkdir -p criu/
-        tar -xf $CRIU_FILENAME -C criu
-        mv $(find criu/ -type f -name criu) criu/criu
+        export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
+        sudo apt-get update
+        sudo apt-get install -y software-properties-common
+        sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:criu/ppa
+        sudo apt-get update
+        sudo apt-get install -y criu
@@ -65,1 +52,1 @@
-      if: steps.criu.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+      if: steps.criu_cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
@@ -67,1 +54,1 @@
-    - name: Setup CRIU
+    - name: Set SUID bit on CRIU
@@ -69,4 +56,1 @@
-        JDK_CRIU=${{ inputs.jdk-path }}/lib/criu
-        cp criu/criu $JDK_CRIU
-        sudo chown root:root $JDK_CRIU
-        sudo chmod u+s $JDK_CRIU
+        sudo chmod u+s /usr/sbin/criu

@@ -361,21 +361,0 @@
-
-################################################################################
-# Setup CRaC CRIU
-################################################################################
-AC_DEFUN_ONCE([LIB_SETUP_CRIU_CRAC],
-[
-  AC_ARG_WITH(criu-crac, [AS_HELP_STRING([--with-criu-crac],
-      [use specified criu binary for CRaC implementation])])
-
-  AC_MSG_CHECKING([for criu-crac])
-
-  USE_CRIU_CRAC=
-  if test -f "${with_criu_crac}"; then
-    USE_CRIU_CRAC="${with_criu_crac}"
-    AC_MSG_RESULT([exists])
-  else
-    AC_MSG_RESULT([none])
-  fi
-
-  AC_SUBST(USE_CRIU_CRAC)
-])

@@ -72,3 +72,1 @@
-            // TODO: use more official image
-            String baseImage = Platform.isMusl() ? "ghcr.io/crac/test-base-musl" : "ghcr.io/crac/test-base";
-            builder.withBaseImage(baseImage, "latest")
+            builder

@@ -46,6 +46,1 @@
-        final var builder = new CracBuilder().engine(CracEngine.CRIU)
-            // Disabling direct_map to be able to overwrite the first image,
-            // otherwise the second image will depend on the first one,
-            // and we will get errors on the second restore
-            .vmOption("-XX:CRaCEngineOptions=direct_map=false");
-
+        final var builder = new CracBuilder().engine(CracEngine.CRIU);
